texto: Character in leadership comes down to two questions: Would you trade places with anyone under your command? Do you hold yourself to the same level of accountability as those for whom you bear responsibility?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gary J. Byrne que provoca temas ligados a lideranca. Ao questionar “Character in leadership comes down to two questions: Would you trade places with anyone under you…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre lideranca, character, leadership, com foco em leadership.
